en.text: What is said regarding the Witr prayer

ar.text: وَعَنْ نَافِعٍ، أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ عُمَرَ، كَانَ يُسَلِّمُ بَيْنَ الرَّكْعَةِ وَالرَّكْعَتَيْنِ فِي الْوِتْرِ، حَتَّى يَأْمُرَ بِبَعْضِ حَاجَتِهِ‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Abdullah bin Umeri: Ai jepte selam mes dy rekateve (të para) dhe rekatit tek në namazin e vitrit, aq sa ndonjëherë kërkonte t'i kryhej ndonjë punë e tij.

en.text: Nafi` told that `Abdullah bin `Umar used to say Taslim between (the first) two Rak`at and (the third) odd one in the Witr prayer, when he wanted to attend to a certain matter (during that interval between the Rak`at).
